title: vcd2fsdb failed
body:
Hi:

  I`m running the [verilog-axi](https://github.com/alexforencich/verilog-axi) testbenches and use the following configuration to generate the fst file：

```
ifeq ($(WAVES), 1)
VERILOG_SOURCES += iverilog_dump.v
COMPILE_ARGS += -s iverilog_dump
endif

iverilog_dump.v:
	echo 'module iverilog_dump();' > $@
	echo 'initial begin' >> $@
	echo '    $$dumpfile("$(TOPLEVEL).fst");' >> $@
	echo '    $$dumpvars(0, $(TOPLEVEL));' >> $@
	echo 'end' >> $@
	echo 'endmodule' >> $@
  
```

and then I use 'fst2vcd' command converts fst file to vcd, I can use GTKWave to view all waveforms. But when I use 'vcd2fsdb' command converts vcd file to fsdb, and use Verdi to view waveforms, then I can only view the  three layers waveforms of the fsdb file.The warning of the Verdi is that failed to add certain signals to waveform because they cannot be found in FSDB.

what could be the cause of the problem？Thanks
code_blocks:
ifeq ($(WAVES), 1)
VERILOG_SOURCES += iverilog_dump.v
COMPILE_ARGS += -s iverilog_dump
endif

iverilog_dump.v:
	echo 'module iverilog_dump();' > $@
	echo 'initial begin' >> $@
	echo '    $$dumpfile("$(TOPLEVEL).fst");' >> $@
	echo '    $$dumpvars(0, $(TOPLEVEL));' >> $@
	echo 'end' >> $@
	echo 'endmodule' >> $@
